So let me talk you through the whole process and how it works. Right? This this is a framework to think about how Myo V2 Pro can work inside your business. It has four layers. So you got layer number one, which is the brain, right? So this is my V2 Pro itself. The model does the thinking, right? Most people just use AI to chat, but this can use it as a thinking engine, right? And it was specifically trained for this to handle multi-step reasoning to use tools to use tools like openclaw specifically. Then you got the tools themselves. So it needs a brain to think with. So for example inside open claw or open code you can connect to myo v2 pro to your website your files your web search your email if you wanted to your automation workflows your spreadsheets and databases. And then you've got layer number three which is the workflow itself. Right? So this is where the magic happens. And a workflow is just a sequence of tasks that happen automatically. So you define it once and then it runs over and over. So for example, you could use this to answer questions on your website or for automatic lead uh research. You could for example use it for creating content itself daily. And then finally you got layer four which the output where more content more customer touch points, more leads, more people finding your business, right?
